evidence: "Creepy old school horror with Golden Age legend Fred Astaire!"
"A classic slasher with a splash of murder mystery thrown in."
"If you want a movie with such a simple plot that you only need 47 brain cells to follow it..."
"Started off cool, but it began to drag after the 45 minute mark."
"An edge of your seat thrill ride!"
"Poorly directed, poorly acted, and poorly written. However, the directors heart was in the right place; so I wouldn't call it terrible."
"Okay Alien rip off. Only worth watching for Demi Moore's youthful role."
"I've been a die hard KotH fan since it's premier when I was a high school senior!"
"The only true sequel to the 70's horror classic!"
"This film pushed the envelope in the early 1970's in terms of gore!"
"While there are many episodes beyond season 11 that were noteworthy..."

summary: The user enjoys horror, thriller, and cult films with a preference for simple narratives and fast pacing. They show low sensitivity to production quality and have mixed feelings about brand loyalty, indicating a focus on entertainment over emotional depth.
